results.name: client_health
results.label: Client Health
results.calculationFormula:
if if contains(string(tag_participation_at_qu), '2') then 2
elseif contains(string(tag_participation_at_qu), '1') then 1 else 0 + if contains(string(logins_last_30_days), '20') then 2
elseif contains(string(logins_last_30_days), 'plus') then 1 else 0 + if contains(string(login_trend), 'increase') then 2
elseif contains(string(login_trend), 'within') then 1 else 0 + if contains(string(rex_use_case_engagement), 'multiple') then 2
elseif contains(string(rex_use_case_engagement), 'single') then 1 else 0 + if contains(string(case_studymarketing_participation), 'agreed') then 2
elseif contains(string(case_studymarketing_participation), 'open') then 1 else 0 + if contains(string(user_community_group_participation), 'proactive') then 2
elseif contains(string(user_community_group_participation), 'passive') then 1 else 0 + if contains(string(data_update_status), 'time') then 2
elseif contains(string(data_update_status), 'late') then 1 else 0 + if contains(string(advisory_hours_usage), '80') then 2
elseif contains(string(advisory_hours_usage), '50') then 1 else 0 + if contains(string(tag_activity), 'independently') then 2
elseif contains(string(tag_activity), 'prompting') then 1 else 0 / 18 * 100 >= 75 then 'Green'
elseif if contains(string(tag_participation_at_qu), '2') then 2
elseif contains(string(tag_participation_at_qu), '1') then 1 else 0 + if contains(string(logins_last_30_days), '20') then 2
elseif contains(string(logins_last_30_days), 'plus') then 1 else 0 + if contains(string(login_trend), 'increase') then 2
elseif contains(string(login_trend), 'within') then 1 else 0 + if contains(string(rex_use_case_engagement), 'multiple') then 2
elseif contains(string(rex_use_case_engagement), 'single') then 1 else 0 + if contains(string(case_studymarketing_participation), 'agreed') then 2
elseif contains(string(case_studymarketing_participation), 'open') then 1 else 0 + if contains(string(user_community_group_participation), 'proactive') then 2
elseif contains(string(user_community_group_participation), 'passive') then 1 else 0 + if contains(string(data_update_status), 'time') then 2
elseif contains(string(data_update_status), 'late') then 1 else 0 + if contains(string(advisory_hours_usage), '80') then 2
elseif contains(string(advisory_hours_usage), '50') then 1 else 0 + if contains(string(tag_activity), 'independently') then 2
elseif contains(string(tag_activity), 'prompting') then 1 else 0 / 18 * 100 >= 40 then 'Amber' else 'Red'
